This card can only be attached to Psychic Pokémon. This card provides Psychic Energy, but only while this card is attached to a Psychic Pokémon.

The Retreat Cost of the Pokémon this card is attached to is ColorlessColorless less.

(If this card is attached to anything other than a Psychic Pokémon, discard this card.)
name: Mystery Energy

attacks.name: Overrun
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Assault Laser
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool card attached to it, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Night Attack
attacks.effect: Put 3 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dark Corridor
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

abilities.name: Hyper Hypnosis
abilities.effect: When you attach an Energy from your hand to this Pokémon, you may use this Ability. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: MAXamar
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 60 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Lead
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Bright Garden
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage times the number of Grass Pokémon and Fairy Pokémon you have in play.

effect: Put 1 of your Pokémon into your hand. (Discard all cards attached to that Pokémon.)
name: AZ

effect: Each player shuffles all cards in his or her discard pile into his or her deck (except for Lysandre's Trump Card).
name: Lysandre's Trump Card

effect: Choose a Pokémon Tool or Special Energy card attached to a Pokémon in play (yours or your opponent's) and discard it.
name: Xerosic

attacks.name: Turbo Bolt
attacks.effect: Attach 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Phantom Gate
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

attacks.name: Chrono Wind
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is a Pokémon-EX, it can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Full Metal Impact
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon.
